title: Cognizant is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Cognizant is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Cognizant has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Cognizant:
Cognizant is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cognizant!
